web_results.title: Bitcoin News: OpenClaw Bans Crypto Talk But AI Agents Use BTC Anyway - The Coin Republic
web_results.description: Despite the Discord ban, OpenClaw AI agents heavily use Bitcoin for operations. Agents pay for computing using the Bitcoin Lightning Network, allowing instant small payments. One agent spawned a child bot on a rented server and paid for hosting through Lightning without a human touching the transaction. Others buy API credits, monitor Bitcoin wallets, and trade perpetual contracts. Bitcoin Lightning solves key problems for autonomous agents.
